caption: The video shows a close-up view of a car's dashboard, focusing on the instrument cluster. The dashboard displays various gauges and indicators, including the speedometer, tachometer, fuel gauge, and temperature gauge. The digital display in the center shows the time as 12:13 and indicates that the vehicle is stationary with a speed of 0 mph. The "Door Ajar" warning light is illuminated, indicating that one of the car doors is not fully closed. The camera remains steady, capturing the details of the dashboard without any significant movement or changes in the scene. The overall setting suggests that the car is parked, and the driver is either preparing to start the vehicle or has just turned off the engine.
